name: Creamy Cranberry-Orange Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the cream cheese and sour cream, beating until smooth.
2. Stir in the cranberry orange relish.
3. Chill.
4. Serve over fruit salads.
Makes 1 1/2 cups
Good on grapefruit sections, apples or oranges. Also good as a fruit dip.
